epics.label: Epic3: Location Flexibility: Cities and Counties

userStories.label: US1 : As a user, I want to see important navigation links in the footer, so that I can easily access key pages
US2 : As a user, I want the footer to be clearly structured so that I can easily find the information I need
US3 : As a user with accessibility needs, I want to navigate the footer using assistive technologies so that I can access all links without barriers
US4 : As a user, I want to see a list of relevant jobs after performing a search, so that I can quickly identify suitable opportunities
US5 : As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by city, so that I can see only the jobs available in the location that interests me
US6 : As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by company, so that I can see only the jobs posted by a specific employer (e.g., DEDEMAN)
US7 : As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by work mode (e.g. Fizic, Hybrid, La distanta), so that I can see only the jobs that match my work preferences
US8 : As a user, I want the footer to be consistent across all pages, so that I have a uniform experience
US9 : As a user, I want the footer to always be visible at the bottom of the page, so that I can access it easily
US10 : As a user, I want a quick way to go back to the top of the page from the footer, so that I save time
US11 : As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria (e.g., company, location, work mode, industry) so that I can see job listings matching my criteria
US12 : As a user, I want to access 'Politica de confidențialitate' and 'Condiții de utilizare' from the footer, so that I understand how my data is used
US13 : As a user, I want to see copyright information in the footer, so that I know who owns the platform
US14 : As a user, I want to see information about the organization behind the platform, so that I can trust the service
US15 : As a website user, I want to see social media icons in the footer so that I can easily find the company’s social profiles
US16 : As a website user, I want to click on social media icons so that I can access the company’s social media pages
US17 : As a website user, I want to see tooltips on social media icons so that I understand where each link leads
US18 : As a user, I want the footer to render correctly in all supported browsers so that I have a consistent visual experience
US19 : As a user, I want all footer links to function correctly across different browsers so that I can navigate without issues
US20 : As a user, I want the footer to behave consistently across browsers so that interactions feel the same everywhere
US21 : As a user, I want the footer to display correctly on different devices so that I can have a consistent experience regardless of screen size
US22 : As a user, I want the website footer to function correctly across different operating systems so that I can have a consistent experience regardless of the platform I use
US23 : As a user, I want the footer to follow the same visual style as the rest of the website so that the interface feels consistent
US24 : As a user, I want the footer content to have a clear visual hierarchy so that I can quickly understand the most important information
US25 : As a user, I want all footer icons and links to have consistent styling so that the interface looks clean and professional
US26 : As a user, I want to search for a city by typing in the location field, so that I can quickly find and select my desired city without scrolling through a long list
US27 : As a user, I want to be able to clear the selected city from the location field, so that I can remove the location filter and see all cities
US28 : As a user, I want to select a location from a predefined list, so that I can easily filter results without typing
US29 : I want the selected location to be visually highlighted, so that I can clearly see what filter is applied
US30 : I want to see only cities relevant to Romania , so that I don’t select invalid locations
US31 :As a user, I want to select a city, so that I can see in the dropdown all the counties from that city
US32 :As a user, I want to see the village name followed by its city in the dropdown list, so that I can clearly distinguish between locations with similar names
